proposal.working_title: AI Workflows for Small Business: How to Connect ChatGPT, Claude, and Your Stack Into One Pipeline in 2026
proposal.one_line_angle: Most owners stitch AI tools together with copy-paste; FirstMovers shows the four connection patterns that turn isolated prompts into a workflow that runs without you.
outline_bullets: Why Copy-Pasting Between ChatGPT, Claude, and Sheets Is Costing Your Team 11 Hours a Week
The Four AI Workflow Patterns: Triggered, Scheduled, Conditional, and Human-in-the-Loop
Picking Your First AI Workflow: A 30-Day Pilot Plan That Survives an Audit and Earns Team Buy-In
